examples: By his command, a repast was brought such as Tom had never encountered before except in books.
Well then, good luck to the repast!
The guests partook of a luxurious repast in the banqueting hall.
We'd eat giant platefuls of this heavenly repast and then, like true Cariocas (natives of Rio) sleep the afternoon away.
Most people then walk off this delectable repast on a network of sun-dappled trails and wooden walkways, making a bee-line for the waterfalls along the nearby river, Rio Mimoso.
